calendar.matters:
SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Aug-16-2010 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Prove-Up Hearing. Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Jr., Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Lois Jones, CSR #3689.

James F. Watson, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Bank of America, N.A.
Anthony Daniels, real estate agent for plaintiff, and Kenneth Ratliff, process server for plaintiff, were placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendants Laurence Ali or Carlos Sequeira.
Notice of Time and Place of Trial was filed on July 27, 2010.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Bank of America, N.A., and against defendants Laurence Ali and Carlos Sequeira, for POSSESSION ONLY, as follows:

Plaintiff Bank of America, N.A. is entitled to Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 501 Crescent Way, #5313, San Francisco, CA 94134.

Judgment for Possession Only was submitted to and signed by the Court.

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Aug-16-2010 Assigned To Trial Court

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-11-2010 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: The settlement conference is taken off calendar because there are no appearances by defendant.
The trial date of AUG-16-2010 remains on calendar.
